"[66] 37-S1 CT IS SETTING UP THE CLOSURE AT PINE GROVE NOW"
"[64] A37-054 CLOSURE HAS BEEN MOVED, THE ONR TO NB FM PINE GROVE IS SHUT DOWN"
"[63] A37-056 BREAK STARTED NB SO TWIN VIEW"
"[62] A37-056 RAMPING ON NB FM LAKE BLVD, WILL BE BEGINNING BREAK SHORTLY"
"[61] 37-S1 COMMIGN UP TO 54 NOW ADV TO MOVE THE CLOSURE TO THE ONR "
"[57] 37-S1 WILL BRING IN ANOTHER BREAK FM TWIN VIEW // HAVE 54 MOVE THE CLOSURE TO THE NB ON FM PINE GROVE, WILL OPEN THE OFR AND SHUT DOWN THE ONR"

"[52] A37-054 SEE IF S1 WANTS THE PINE GROVE OFR NB STILL SHUT DOWN"
"[51] 37-S1 SPOKE W/ FIRE IC, THEY ARE REQ'ING WE KEEP THE #3 LN CLOSED FOR NOW"

"[44] CT SUP ADV APPX 20 MIN ETA [Shared]"
"[42] 37-S1 NOTIFY 37-C // GIVE HIM QUIT UPDFATE THAT THE #3 IS SHUT DOWN // WILL BE EXTENDED, BUT HAVE SUFFICIENT UNITS -- S1 WILL 1021 HIM WHEN HE IS NOT 10-6 [Shared]"

"[32] S1 CPZ // BRINGING IN ANOTHER ROUND ROBIN FM OASIS [Shared]"
"[31] A37-054 1097 AND HAVE THE #3 LN CLOSED NB JSO PINE GROVE [Shared]"
